title: PRIMES 3-in-1 Waiter's Friend Corkscrew, Bottle Opener, Foil Cutter, Rosewood Handle, Wine Key, Barware Accessory
features: Professionals and All-in-One Needs: This compact waiter's tool seamlessly integrates a bottle opener, wine corkscrew, and foil cutter, all with a comfortable, natural rosewood handle. It transcends mere functionality, doubling as a piece of luxury craftsmanship that complements your cherished wine collection.
Effortless Foil Cutting: The serrated foil cutter is meticulously engineered to effortlessly remove various types of foil while minimizing the risk of slippage or tearing.

Enhanced Leveraging Mechanism: Featuring a double-hinged fulcrum, this tool offers superior leverage compared to traditional single-hinge corkscrews, ensuring smoother and easier wine opening in just two simple steps.
Built to Last: Say goodbye to the frustration of wine openers breaking mid-use. Our design prioritizes durability for heavy-duty use.

Swift Cork Extraction: With a precision-cut notch along the screw, our design reduces drag as it pierces through the cork, securely gripping natural, synthetic, or delicate corks within just five turns. This design advantage sets our product apart from others on the market.
